title: micromeria tenella
intro: Micromeria tenella, also known as Tenella mint or mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Micromeria tenella include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. To harness its benefits, Micromeria tenella can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically in the form of ointments or salves.
